folio.label: 193v
folio.l: He wolde han fled , but that the fox a noon
Seide , gentil Sire allas , whider wol ©e goon
Be ©e affrayed of me , that am ©oure freend
Now certes , I were worse than a feend
If I to ©ow wolde harm , or vylanye´
I nam nat come , ©oure cou~seil for to espie
But trewely the cause , of my comyngö
Was oonly for to herken , how æ ©e syngö
For trewely ©e han , as merie a steuene
As any Aungel hatú , æ is in heuene
Ther w ©e han in Musyke , more felynge
Than had Boice , or any æ can synge
My lord ©oure fader , god his soule blisse
And eke ©oure moder , of hire gentillesse
Han in myn hous I ben , to my gret ese
And certes sire , ful fayn wolde I ©ow plese
But for men speke of syngynge , I wol seye
So mote I brouke wel , myne eyen tweye
Saue ©e , I ne herd neuäe , man so synge
As dede ©oure fader , in the morwenynge
Certes it was of herte , al that he songö
And for to make his voys , the more strongö
He wolde so peyne úi~ , æ witú bothe hise eyen
He muste wynke , so loude he wolde cryen
And stonden on his tipptou~ , ther witú al
And strecche fortú his nekke , longe & smal
And eke he was , of swicú discrecioun
That æäe nas noman , in no regioun
That úi~ in songö or wysdam , mygúte passe
I haue wel red , in Daun Burnel the Asse
Amongö his vers , how æ æäe was a Cok

note.notetxt: 493 There is a small cross in the left margin. RJ

folio.l: That for a Preestes sone , ©af úi~ a knok
Vp on his leg , whil he was ©ong & nyce
He made úi~ for to lese , his benefice
But certeyn æäe is , no com¹isoun
Betwix the wysdom , & discrecioun
Of ©oure fader , and of his subtilitee
Now syngetú sire , for seynt Charitee
¢ Lat se , kan ©e ©oure fader countrefete
This Chauntecler , his wenges gan to bete
As man æ coude , his tresou~ nat espie
So was he rauysshed , witú his flaterie
Allas ©e lordes , many a fals flatäour
